subject: docs(guides): write comprehensive user guide and testing guide
body:
Populate USER_GUIDE.md with complete user-facing documentation covering
all features: budgets, expenses, projected spend, cashflow, compare,
import wizard, PWA features, and navigation. Written in plain language
for non-technical users as required by project standards.

Populate TESTING_GUIDE.md with 50+ manual test scenarios organized by
feature area, plus a quick regression checklist. Covers happy paths,
validation errors, edge cases, data integrity, and PWA features.

Both documents derived from comprehensive user flow analysis of all
views, components, and engine logic in the codebase.

Tags: documentation, user-guide, testing-guide, quality
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
title: write comprehensive user guide and testing guide
